# PharosVille

Canonical app: https://pharosville.pharos.watch/
Repository: https://github.com/TokenBrice/pharosville

PharosVille is a desktop-only React and Canvas 2D maritime observatory for live Pharos stablecoin signals. It visualizes stablecoin supply, chain dock presence, and risk/status signals as ships, harbors, water zones, detail panels, and an accessibility ledger.

The app is an interpretive data visualization, not financial advice. It does not provide wallet connection, trading, custody, user accounts, or browser-exposed API credentials.

Important security boundary: browser code calls same-origin /api/* only. Cloudflare Pages Functions proxy allowlisted read endpoints to PHAROS_API_BASE and inject PHAROS_API_KEY server-side. PHAROS_API_KEY must never appear in VITE_* variables, static JavaScript, HTML, query strings, logs, docs, or fixtures.

Key docs:
- README: https://github.com/TokenBrice/pharosville#readme

- Changelog: https://github.com/TokenBrice/pharosville/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
